name: skill-test-testing-doc-contract-workflow
title: Skill Test TESTING.md contract draft and apply workflow
description: Add a guarded chat-workbench workflow for explicitly previewing, confirming, applying, and refreshing a skill TESTING.md environment contract when heavy-environment skills lack a stable contract.
scope: .agents/skills/skill-test-design-workbench/SKILL.md, lib/skill-registry.ts, public/chat/skill-test-design-panel.js, server/api/skill-test-controller.ts, server/domain/skill-test/*, server/domain/conversation/turn/*, tests/skill-test/*, .trellis/spec/skills/skill-testing.md
creator: 菲比啾比
notes: Follow-up child of 04-21-skill-test-chat-workbench-mode. Tracks the explicit TESTING.md draft/preview/apply workflow for skills whose execution tests are blocked by missing environment contracts.

keyRisks: sourceKind provenance must stay separate from canonical environmentSource
safe fixed-path TESTING.md write with explicit overwrite preview
matrix environment-source refresh requires explicit re-confirmation after apply
